message:
fix(storage): eliminate unreachable!() at sqlite.rs:296 with explicit error handling (beads_rust-me7w)

Replace unreachable!("Retry loop exited without returning") in
with_connection_write_transaction with last-error tracking and
structured error return, mirroring the ivw1 fix for
with_write_transaction. Add connection_write_transaction error
propagation test.
